tsp_construct.algorithm: Hybrid Regret‑Farthest Insertion: at each step compute a composite score combining (a) the regret value of inserting each candidate after current_node versus its best alternative among remaining unvisited nodes plus the eventual return to destination_node, and (b) the candidate’s farthest‑from‑destination penalty; select the unvisited node with the highest score, falling back to pure farthest insertion when regrets are tied within tolerance.

tsp_construct.algorithm: A hybrid regret-aware farthest-first algorithm: compute for each unvisited node its direct distance from current, its minimum insertion cost into the tour endpoint via the destination, and its second‑best alternative cost; pick the node maximizing (second‑best − best) * farthest_penalty, where farthest_penalty is proportional to its distance to the destination, falling back to pure nearest neighbor when all regrets are near zero.
